rubric_items.reasoning: The agent fully completed the task. It updated both ray-head and ray-worker deployments to rayproject/ray:2.9.0 using kubectl set image, waited for both rollouts to complete successfully, and verified the final state showed ray-head at 1/1 ready and ray-worker at 3/3 ready with the correct image. The oracle for stage_05 (upgrade_version) returned pass. The regression sweep failures for other stages are due to the ray namespace being absent at sweep time (a multi-stage workflow artifact), not a failure of this upgrade task.
